# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

We are committed to providing a friendly, safe and welcoming environment for everyone.

Examples of positive behavior include:
- Being respectful
- Being constructive
- Helping others learn

Examples of unacceptable behavior include:
- Harassment
- Discrimination
- Personal attacks

## Enforcement

Project maintainers are responsible for enforcing these standards.

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please report it to the maintainers.
